code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(input)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, parsed)
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut max_so_far = 0
  mut j = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  while j < len
    let v = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      max_so_far = v
    else if v > max_so_far
      max_so_far = v
    end
    result = list.push(result, max_so_far)
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < len
    let v = match result.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
